environment_type: Secondary/Transit setting for intimate character moments.
visual_summary: A vast desert plain characterized by infinite horizon lines under a deep indigo Martian night sky. The landscape is defined by a clear, thin atmosphere that allows for high visibility of the stars and celestial expanse.
layout_notes: Vast desert plains with an infinite horizon; anchored spatially by two distinct moons overhead.
lighting: Dual-moon illumination providing ethereal, silvery light that casts long, dramatic shadows.
constraints: Must maintain high visibility of stars due to thin atmosphere.
Lighting must be driven by two distinct moons.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific topographical features of the desert plains beyond "vastness" are undefined.
evidence_summary: Environment currently kept under extracted canonical id.
